\vspace{0.3em}


\block{research statement}

My research spans two areas: NeuroAI and Trustworthy AI. Within \textbf{NeuroAI}, I pursue \textit{Neuroscience for AI} ({\small \textcolor{gray}{NeurIPS2023, ICLR2025}}), translating brain mechanisms into model architectures, and \textit{AI for Neuroscience} ({\small \textcolor{gray}{IJCV2024, Exp.Mol.Med.2026}}), applying ML to behavioral and neural data. Within \textbf{Trustworthy AI}, I focus on \textit{AI Interpretability} ({\small \textcolor{gray}{ICML2026 Oral}}), probing memory traces in LLMs, and \textit{AI Alignment} ({\small \textcolor{gray}{AAAI2026, ACL2026-f}}), studying human-LLM decision alignment.
